label: L3 Low (narrow trajectory priors)
description: Keeps trajectory parameters free but narrows their priors. Growth-rate sigmas are halved and truncation tightened. 2075 CAV/STI target triangulars are pulled toward their modes. Efficiency-doubling triangular narrowed around 2.8 years. Intended for presentations where the reader should see a trajectory band but not a long-horizon explosion.

notes.region_identical: CA and OH share the same L3 priors as in MEDIUM; Ohio narrower support does not imply Ohio-specific evidence has been added (dossier S2-04).
notes.us_average_note: For US Average the CAV and STI triangulars are shifted centres; this L3_low tightens around the California centres only. Dashboards must hide LOW for US Average until a US-centred low preset is added.
